videos.headline: R. Shell run for 6 yds for a TD
videos.description: Rushel Shell run for 6 yds for a TD

videos.headline: BYU WR dives for end zone to tie game
videos.description: BYU WR Mitchell Juergens makes the catch and sprints toward the end zone before diving in to even the score with West Virginia.

videos.headline: S. Howard pass intercepted by S. Powell
videos.description: Skyler Howard pass intercepted Sawyer Powell return for 20 yds to the BYU 41

videos.headline: BYU RB breaks 56-yard run
videos.description: BYU RB Jamaal Williams bursts through for a 56-yard gain.

videos.headline: Shell finds end zone for second time
videos.description: West Virginia RB Rushel Shell scores his second touchdown of the game from two yards out to give the Mountaineers a 14-10 lead over BYU.

videos.headline: T. Hill pass intercepted for a TD by R. Douglas
videos.description: Taysom Hill pass intercepted for a TD Rasul Douglas return for 55 yds for a TD

videos.headline: BYU QB bounces off defenders in midair and keeps moving
videos.description: BYU QB Taysom Hill shows off his hops leaping onto a pair of West Virginia defenders, then bounces off and stays on his feet during a 27-yard run.

videos.headline: J. Williams runs for 7-yard TD
videos.description: Jamaal Williams run for 7 yds for a TD

videos.headline: West Virginia recovers BYU fumble
videos.description: Jamaal Williams run for 1 yd to the WVU 41 and fumbles, which is recovered by WVU's Khairi Sharif

videos.headline: S. Howard pass to S. Gibson for 51 yds for a 1ST down
videos.description: Skyler Howard pass complete to Shelton Gibson for 51 yds to the BYU 8 for a 1ST down

videos.headline: Howard's TD run gives WVU breathing room
videos.description: West Virginia QB Syler Howard scrambles for a 5-yard touchdown run to extend the Mountaineers' lead to 28-19.

videos.headline: S. Howard pass to S. Gibson for 32 yds for a 1ST down
videos.description: Skyler Howard pass complete to Shelton Gibson for 32 yds to the BYU 9 for a 1ST down

videos.headline: West Virginia takes 16-point lead over BYU
videos.description: Skyler Howard finds a wide open Daikiel Shorts in the end zone to give West Virginia a 35-19 lead over BYU.

videos.headline: BYU creeps closer on Williams' three-yard TD run
videos.description: Jamaal Williams scores from three yards out to cut West Virginia's lead to 35-25.

videos.headline: BYU pulls within three of West Virginia
videos.description: Taysom Hill hits Moroni Laulu-Pututau over the middle for an 18-yard touchdown to cut West Virginia's lead to 35-32 over BYU.

videos.headline: T. Hill pass intercepted by J. Tyler
videos.description: Taysom Hill pass intercepted Jeremy Tyler return for no gain to the BYU 39

videos.headline: West Virginia fumbles in red zone
videos.description: Tyler Orlosky run for a loss of 2 yards to the BYU 6 Tyler Orlosky fumbled, recovered by BYU Francis Bernard
